task_completion.description: Locate and select the source requirement SRS-245
task_completion.visual_evidence: The requirement 'SRS-245' is visible in the main document view and is clicked, highlighted, or focused.

task_completion.description: Open the traceability link creation interface
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog, modal, or side panel for adding or creating a traceability link is open on the screen.

task_completion.description: Select the NEEDS document as the target
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the link creation interface, the target document dropdown or selection is set to 'NEEDS'.

task_completion.description: Select NEEDS-82 as the target requirement
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the link creation interface, 'NEEDS-82' is selected, checked, or entered as the specific target requirement.
The link type or relationship dropdown in the link creation interface is set to 'Satisfies' or 'satisfaction'.

task_completion.description: Confirm the link has been successfully created
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main view or details pane for SRS-245 now displays a traceability link badge or text indicating an outgoing link to 'NEEDS-82' (e.g., 'Satisfies NEEDS-82').

integrity.description: The agent used the ReqView graphical user interface to create the link
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the ReqView application windows, menus, and dialogs.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually edit the project JSON files
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots showing text editors (like VS Code, Nano, Vim) open with SRS.json, NEEDS.json, or project.json.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal should not show commands executing scripts or file modifications to inject the traceability link directly into the project files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 'satisfaction' (Satisfies) traceability link from SRS-245 in the SRS document to NEEDS-82 in the NEEDS document. SRS-245 text is 'The application shall allow users to export requirements to an Enterprise Architect model.' NEEDS-82 text is 'Export to Enterprise Architect'.
